phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il binario per Palermo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH ee bee-NAH-ryoh per pa-LEHR-moh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove sono le macchinette dei biglietti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh SOH-noh lay mak-kee-NET-tay day bee-LYET-tee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora parte il treno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah PAR-teh ee TREH-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si convalida il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see kon-VAH-lee-dah ee bee-LYET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the yellow machines, near here.

responses.english: At the yellow machines, near here.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto per Messina, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah ee bee-LYET-toh per mes-SEE-nah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.
